note: Multi-seed results are reproducible for this fixed seed list. Each seed regenerates negatives, train/test split, GO feature selection, and model random states.

negative_type_definitions.corrupted_pathway: A small true pathway core (20-50%) is kept and the remaining genes are replaced by random background genes.
negative_type_definitions.cross_pathway_mixture: Genes are drawn from two or more different broad pathway families, with no single source contributing more than 60%.
negative_type_definitions.empirical_size_matched_random: Uniform background genes with target sizes sampled from the empirical positive pathway size distribution for the same split.
negative_type_definitions.full_replacement_shuffled: A source pathway size is preserved but all original genes are replaced by background genes.

runs.note: NO EMBEDDING in this version. SVD/UMAP features are not used by the final model.

split.feature_selection: GO terms selected on training split only
